value_chain_position: Advanced packaging and test services (OSAT) — bonds, packages and tests chips from foundries into final assemblies including flip-chip, fan-out wafer-level, and 2.5D/3D packaging.
relative_comps: Amkor is the second-largest OSAT globally after ASE (ASX); it is a key packaging partner for Apple (smartphone SiPs), AMD/NVIDIA (HBM assembly) and automotive chips. Advanced packaging (2.5D CoWoS-equivalent) is a genuine AI theme driver as chip complexity demands heterogeneous integration. However, FCF margin of only 2.4% signals a commoditizing business — OSAT is capital-intensive with thin margins; differentiation in advanced packaging is partial. 3-year revenue CAGR is slightly negative. Trades at ~15x forward earnings reflecting its lower-margin profile.
